oai_dc:dc.dc:title: President's Message
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Waskey, Lewis "Buddy"
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Greetings! On behalf of the Board of Directors and myself, I am pleased to invite you to attend the American Federation of Aviculture's 2025 Annual Conference, to be held September 3-6, 2025, in Raleigh, North Carolina. We are excited to announce that Kashmir Csaky will be our keynote speaker. The conference will feature a full schedule of presentations over three days, complemented by nightly events designed for networking, education, and entertainment. [For the full article, with images, please open the PDF link below]
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 52 No. 2 (2025): Volume 52 July 2025 issue of AFA Watchbird
